chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-1862 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ 1. For order on CMA No. 11001/2025 2. For order on office objections No. 1 to 7 3. For order on CMA No. 9305/2025 4. For hearing of main case 02.06.2025 Mr. Altaf Hussain advocate for the petitioner -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the petitioner has sought quashment of approximately seven FIRs, alleging that they are based on false documents. The petitioner may, if necessary, seek protection under the law. In the meantime, he shall join the inquiries and the I.Os shall carry out investigation impartially and strictly in accordance with law. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with all pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Wasim PS
